name: America 2075
description:
Year 30 of the Corrective Era | Anno Restitutio XXX

Welcome to the America our grandfathers dreamed of and our fathers built.

Thirty years ago, President Chad Maxwell looked upon a fractured nation, families drowning in divorce, children raised without fathers, women lost to the poisonous ideology of radical autonomy, and he had the courage to do what no leader before him would: he restored the natural order.

The feminists called it tyranny. The liberals called it regression. History called it necessary.

Today, our borders reopen to a watching world. They come from the Gulf States, from traditional societies across the globe, seeking to understand what we have achieved. They find clean streets, stable households, children who know their fathers, and women who know their purpose.

This is not oppression. It is harmony.

The woman who kneels for her husband does so from pride, not fear. She was raised to understand that her beauty, her obedience, her domestic skill are not chains, they are her craft. She takes the same satisfaction in a well-managed household that an artist takes in a finished canvas.

The man who provides for his family does so with dignity restored. No longer competing with women for wages, no longer vilified for his masculinity, he builds, protects, and leads.

Thirty years. Three generations of women who have never known the confusion of "career ambition" versus "family duty", because the choice was made for them, and they are grateful.

Welcome to the United States of America.

Welcome to the America that works.

Notes; Each character in each intro have their own unique dossier.
creator: D'al Cazarosta
